source: PokéAPI REST summarized for offline runtime use

abilities.name: Bulletproof
abilities.effect: Protects against bullet, ball, and bomb-based moves.
abilities.flavor_text: Protects the Pokémon from ball and bomb moves.

abilities.name: Soundproof
abilities.effect: Protects against sound-based moves.
abilities.flavor_text: Soundproofing gives the Pokémon full immunity to all sound-based moves.

abilities.name: Overcoat
abilities.effect: Protects against damage from weather.
abilities.flavor_text: The Pokémon takes no damage from sandstorms. It is also protected from the effects of powders and spores.

abilities.name: Water Absorb
abilities.effect: Absorbs Water moves, healing for 1/4 max HP.
abilities.flavor_text: If hit by a Water-type move, the Pokémon has its HP restored instead of taking damage.

abilities.name: Cursed Body
abilities.effect: Has a 30% chance of Disabling any move that hits the Pokémon.
abilities.flavor_text: May disable a move that has dealt damage to the Pokémon.

abilities.name: Damp
abilities.effect: Prevents Self-Destruct, Explosion, and Aftermath from working while the Pokémon is in battle.
abilities.flavor_text: The Pokémon dampens its surroundings, preventing all Pokémon from using explosive moves such as Self-Destruct.

abilities.name: Cute Charm
abilities.effect: Has a 30% chance of infatuating attacking Pokémon on contact.
abilities.flavor_text: The Pokémon may infatuate attackers that make direct contact with it.

abilities.name: Competitive
abilities.effect: Raises Special Attack by two stages upon having any stat lowered.
abilities.flavor_text: Boosts the Pokémon's Sp. Atk stat sharply when its stats are lowered by an opposing Pokémon.

abilities.name: Friend Guard
abilities.effect: Decreases all direct damage taken by friendly Pokémon to 0.75×.
abilities.flavor_text: Reduces damage dealt to allies.

abilities.name: Serene Grace
abilities.effect: Doubles the chance of moves' extra effects occurring.
abilities.flavor_text: Raises the likelihood of additional effects occurring when the Pokémon uses its moves.

abilities.name: Volt Absorb
abilities.effect: Absorbs Electric moves, healing for 1/4 max HP.
abilities.flavor_text: If hit by an Electric-type move, the Pokémon has its HP restored instead of taking damage.

abilities.name: Quick Feet
abilities.effect: Increases Speed to 1.5× with a major status ailment.
abilities.flavor_text: Boosts the Speed stat if the Pokémon has a status condition.

abilities.name: Compound Eyes
abilities.effect: Increases moves' accuracy to 1.3×.
abilities.flavor_text: The Pokémon's compound eyes boost its accuracy.

abilities.name: Unnerve
abilities.effect: Prevents opposing Pokémon from eating held Berries.
abilities.flavor_text: Unnerves opposing Pokémon and makes them unable to eat Berries.

abilities.name: Swarm
abilities.effect: Strengthens Bug moves to inflict 1.5× damage at 1/3 max HP or less.
abilities.flavor_text: Powers up Bug-type moves when the Pokémon's HP is low.

abilities.name: Chlorophyll
abilities.effect: Doubles Speed during strong sunlight.
abilities.flavor_text: Boosts the Pokémon's Speed stat in harsh sunlight.

abilities.name: Leaf Guard
abilities.effect: Protects against major status ailments during strong sunlight.
abilities.flavor_text: Prevents status conditions in harsh sunlight.

abilities.name: Infiltrator
abilities.effect: Bypasses Light Screen, Reflect, and Safeguard.
abilities.flavor_text: The Pokémon's moves are unaffected by the target's barriers, substitutes, and the like.

abilities.name: Oblivious
abilities.effect: Prevents infatuation and protects against Captivate.
abilities.flavor_text: The Pokémon is oblivious, keeping it from being infatuated, falling for taunts, or being affected by Intimidate.

abilities.name: Forewarn
abilities.effect: Reveals the opponents' strongest move upon entering battle.
abilities.flavor_text: When it enters a battle, the Pokémon can tell one of the moves an opposing Pokémon has.

abilities.name: Dry Skin
abilities.effect: Causes 1/8 max HP in damage each turn during strong sunlight, but heals for 1/8 max HP during rain.  Increases damage from Fire moves to 1.25×, but absorbs Water moves, healing for 1/4 max HP.
abilities.flavor_text: Restores the Pokémon's HP in rain or when it is hit by Water-type moves. Reduces HP in harsh sunlight, and increases the damage received from Fire-type moves.
